Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 015 [unidentified incantation or ritual][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
oo NaN  (start of obverse missing)
o 1'o 1'

[x x] x x x [...]

(o 1') $ 3 lines traces

o 2'2'

[x x] NA U₂ SAG [...]

o 3'3'

[x x] x NA ⸢IM?⸣

o 4'4'

[KA].⸢INIM⸣.MA UŠ₁₁.⸢BUR₂⸣.[RU.DA-KAM]

(o 4') Wording of the ritual to dispel sorcery.

o 5'5'

⸢DU₃⸣.[DU₃-BI] ⸢NA₄⸣ x ⸢NA₄⸣ GIR GAL na₄AN.x [x x]

(o 5') Its ritual: [...] stone of ..., stone of ..., and ... stone.

o 6'6'

EN₂ 3-šu₂ ŠIDnu ina GU₂-[šu₂ x x]

(o 6') You recite the incantation 3 times. [...] on his neck.

o 7'7'

EN₂ [x x] U₄ 7-KAM U₄ 1(AŠ).1 [...]

(o 7') Incantation: '[...] 7 days, 11 days [...]

o 8'8'

[x x] x x MI TUM TA AN x [x x]

(o 8') $ 2 lines traces

o 9'9'

x [...] TI? NIG₂ x el-li U TAR x [x x]

o 10'10'

⸢LI⸣ x ḪUL KA ip-šu₂ bar-tu₂ a-mat ḪULti₃

(o 10') '... acts of rebellion, words of evil,

o 11'11'

x x x KAL x [x] LA TA x [x x]

(o 11') $ 1 line traces

o 12'12'

x [x x] dUTU u dASAR.LU₂.ḪI u dan-⸢na d?⸣[x x]

(o 12') '... [...] Šamaš and Asalluhi and strong [...].'

o 13'13'

KA.INIM.MA UŠ₁₁.⸢BUR₂.RU⸣.[DA-KAM]

(o 13') Wording of the ritual to dispel sorcery.

o 14'14'

[x] x [...]

(o 14') $ 1 line traces
